description_long: This is a medium-sized, freestanding wooden cabinet with a rich, warm brown finish and a rectangular shape. The front features three square-handled drawers along the top and two paneled doors below, each with matching square handles, providing both concealed and accessible storage. The sides and back are plain, with the wood grain pattern visible throughout, and the base is slightly recessed, giving the cabinet a sturdy yet elegant appearance. The handles and hardware are dark, contrasting subtly with the wood. The surface is flat and smooth, suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. This cabinet would fit well in urban environments such as entryways, offices, or garages, offering both functionality and aesthetic appeal.
description: A medium-sized, freestanding wooden cabinet with three drawers and two paneled doors, finished in warm brown with dark square handles. The design is simple yet elegant, with a smooth, flat top and visible wood grain.
description_view_0: The front view shows three drawers with square handles above two paneled doors, each with matching handles, highlighting the main storage access.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, flat wooden panel with visible grain and no additional features.
description_view_2: The back view displays a continuous, unadorned wooden surface with a consistent grain pattern and no openings or hardware.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a plain wooden panel with no handles or openings.
